calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-12-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George Derieg for (petitioner) Desean Watson, Sr.

The Court stated that it had not received a supplement, that there was an issue regarding the date of notice to the Franchise Tax Board and that we are now in receipt of a declaration. The Court granted the accounting petition and signed the order in open court.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-29-2016 Continued To Apr-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-15-2016 Continued To Mar-29-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Ex Parte Petition For Authority To Borrow Money Execute Note And Deed Of Trust Order Shortening Time
Off Calendar Mar-10-2016 Denied

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-17-2016 Continued To Mar-15-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George Derieg for (petitioner) Desean Watson.

The Court stated that it is waiting for a response to the examiner's notes. Mr. Derieg stated that he is not used to e-filing, that he had a confirmation that the responses were filed but they were not, that the client wants to file an ex parte petition to request a loan on the property, that they need a 6 week continuance and confirmed that the court needs courtesy copies. The Court stated that it is not comfortable with 6 weeks, that if the client decides to extend they may need to file a report on administration so that the parties know what is happening. The accounting petition was continued to March 15, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to clean up the current petition, file an amended petition or file a report on administration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Continued To Feb-17-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that there has been no response to the examiner's notes and continued the accounting petition to February 17, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rodrin. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-23-2015 Continued To Jan-20-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-08-2015 Continued To Dec-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Authority Ty Borrow Money
Off Calendar Jun-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George Derieg (via court call) for Desean Watson Sr. who is present. Angela Watson also present.

The Court asked if counsel has spoken to the city regarding postponing the action. Mr. Derieg reported that he spoke with Manuel Pan who stated that as of July 1, 2015 they will have authorization to proceed with the sale, that the siblings are against selling the property, that this is a time sensitive issue as each month additional money is owed, that they need to obtain a loan to pay the utility companies as well as the 4 years of unpaid property taxes and that his client filed declarations this morning, providing endorsed filed copies to the court for review. Mr. Derieg further stated that the examiner asked for clarification of a certain expense (item 3), and explained that it is a charge for "odd days interest" (4 days, from 5/27-6/1), that he does not have the exact amount in front of him and that it was a small interest charge on closing escrow. The court stated that the amendment regarding the decedent's name is granted and took the petition for authority to borrow money under submission.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
